title: AAGISurvey Shiny App Front End
text: {golem}-based Shiny application wraps AAGISurvey R package, providing point--click interface generating pre-filled AAGI partner feedback survey URLs. replace {AAGISurvey}, simply provides another user-friendly interface creating survey URLs. {AAGISurvey} installed, installed install {AAGISurveyApp}.

title: AAGISurvey Shiny App Front End
text: {AAGISurveyApp} available R-Universe pre-built binaries. get started:

title: AAGISurvey Shiny App Front End
text: Start R, doesn’t matter ’s RStudio, Positron, Nvim-R, R console, VSCode, etc. local session computer. ’ve started R, load library launch app. new browser window tab open click create survey URL. complete ’ve copied URL can click “Stop App” button upper right close browser window.
